days.title: Arrival in Hong Kong
days.subtitle: A day of exploration and food

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: After a fulfilling day, return to the comfort of Hotel Icon for a restful night's sleep. Reflect on your exciting experiences as you unwind.

timeline.title: Check-in at Hotel Icon
timeline.detail: Arrive at the renowned Hotel Icon, known for its luxurious accommodations and stunning views of Victoria Harbour. Check-in process is smooth and friendly.

timeline.title: Activity: Victoria Harbour Boat Tour
timeline.detail: Take a scenic boat tour of Victoria Harbour to admire the breathtaking city skyline and landmarks. Enjoy the refreshing sea breeze while capturing photos.

timeline.title: 📸 Photospot: Tsim Sha Tsui Promenade
timeline.detail: From this promenade, photography enthusiasts can capture stunning views of Hong Kong's skyline at sunset. The reflection on water creates a majestic photo opportunity.
timeline.mapQuery: Tsim Sha Tsui Promenade, Hong Kong
timeline.tip: Best angle: stand at the end of the promenade. Shoot toward the skyline. Best light: golden hour for gorgeous warm tones.

timeline.title: Meal: Street Food Tour
timeline.detail: Join a guided street food tour to experience local delicacies. Sample dishes like dumplings, fish balls, and curry. A must-do for food lovers visiting Hong Kong.

timeline.title: Activity: Evening at Tsim Sha Tsui
timeline.detail: Explore the vibrant Tsim Sha Tsui area filled with shops, restaurants, and scenic views. Great for shopping and experiencing Hong Kong's nightlife atmosphere.

timeline.title: Meal: Dinner at a Local Restaurant
timeline.detail: Savor authentic Cantonese cuisine at a popular local restaurant. Enjoy dishes like Peking duck and dim sum, immersing yourself in local flavors.

timeline.title: Activity: Night Photography at Victoria Harbour
timeline.detail: Cap off the evening by capturing stunning night shots of Victoria Harbour as the skyline lights up. Great for both beginners and experienced photographers.

localTips: Purchase an Octopus card at 7-Eleven for easy access to public transport.
Try the local dim sum for lunch at a nearby restaurant.
Visit Victoria Peak in the evening for stunning night views.

days.title: Exploring Local Markets
days.subtitle: Shopping and historical sites

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel Icon
timeline.detail: Start your day with a sumptuous breakfast at the Hotel Icon's restaurant. Enjoy a wide variety of Cantonese and international dishes, ensuring a filling meal to power your day exploring local markets.

timeline.title: Mong Kok Shopping
timeline.detail: Head to Mong Kok, one of the liveliest districts in Hong Kong, for world-famous shopping. Explore the Ladies' Market and its myriad of shops offering fashion, souvenirs, and street food that perfectly captures local culture.

timeline.title: Lunch at Mak's Noodle
timeline.detail: Enjoy a delicious bowl of wonton noodles at Mak's Noodle, regarded as one of the best spots in Hong Kong. Relish the hand-pulled noodles and fresh wontons for an authentic local experience.

timeline.title: Kowloon Walled City Park Visit
timeline.detail: After lunch, explore Kowloon Walled City Park, a historic site retaining the charm of Hong Kong's past. Stroll through beautifully landscaped gardens and learn about the fascinating history through informative plaques scattered throughout the park.
timeline.mapQuery: Kowloon Walled City Park, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Explore Local Art Galleries
timeline.detail: Visit some of the local art galleries around the Kowloon area. Discover works from both local and international artists, and appreciate the vibrant art scene that reflects Hong Kong's dynamic culture and history.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel for Relaxation
timeline.detail: Head back to Hotel Icon to freshen up and relax for a bit before heading out for the evening. Enjoy the hotel amenities or take a brief break in your comfortable room to recharge.

timeline.title: 📸 Photospot: Temple Street Night Market
timeline.detail: Capture the vibrant atmosphere of the bustling Temple Street Night Market with its myriad of lights, food stalls, and local vendors. It's an excellent spot for nighttime photography.
timeline.mapQuery: Temple Street Night Market, Hong Kong
timeline.tip: Best angle: position yourself at the entrance. Shoot toward the food stalls. Best light: evening blue hour, capturing neon signs and bustling crowds.

timeline.title: Dinner at Temple Street Night Market
timeline.detail: Savor local street food delights at Temple Street Night Market. From fresh seafood to delicious dumplings, the variety is immense, offering a truly authentic taste of Hong Kong's culinary scene.
timeline.mapQuery: Temple Street Night Market, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Nighttime Stroll and Drinks
timeline.detail: After dinner, enjoy a leisurely stroll around the brightly lit streets of Yau Ma Tei. Conclude your night with a drink at a nearby bar, soaking in the vibrant nightlife that surrounds you.

localTips: Bargain at street markets; prices are often negotiable.
Visit during the evening for the best night market atmosphere.
Check out the Temple Street Night Market for local dishes.

days.title: Cultural Immersion
days.subtitle: Temples and the ferry ride

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel Icon
timeline.detail: Start your day with a delicious breakfast buffet at Hotel Icon's Café Scene, featuring a variety of Asian and Western dishes to fuel your adventure.

timeline.title: Visit to Wong Tai Sin Temple
timeline.detail: Explore Wong Tai Sin Temple, known for its stunning architecture and vibrant atmosphere. Don't forget to try your hand at fortune telling using the bamboo sticks.
timeline.mapQuery: Wong Tai Sin Temple, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Take the MTR to Central
timeline.detail: Enjoy a convenient and efficient ride on the MTR from Wong Tai Sin to Central. Observe the metropolitan vibe and bustling environment of Hong Kong's subway system.
timeline.mapQuery: MTR, Wong Tai Sin to Central, Hong Kong

timeline.title: 📸 Photospot: Central Skyline
timeline.detail: Get breathtaking views of the Central skyline, showcasing a mix of historical and modern architecture. Capture the unique contrasts of Hong Kong's urban landscape.
timeline.tip: Best angle: from the Mid-Levels Escalator. Shoot toward the skyscrapers in the backdrop. Best light: early afternoon.

timeline.title: Lunch at Tim Ho Wan
timeline.detail: Indulge in a Michelin-starred dim sum experience at Tim Ho Wan, known for its delicious baked buns and dumplings. A must-visit spot for food lovers!

timeline.title: Explore Central District
timeline.detail: Wander through Central, exploring its historic buildings, trendy shops, and local markets. Make sure to stop by some of the unique galleries and street art.

timeline.title: Star Ferry Ride
timeline.detail: Experience a scenic ride on the iconic Star Ferry across Victoria Harbour. Enjoy stunning views of the skyline and the harbor during this short yet picturesque journey.

timeline.title: Dinner at Jumbo Floating Restaurant
timeline.detail: Enjoy a unique dining experience at the Jumbo Floating Restaurant, renowned for its seafood. Savor delicious dishes while taking in the ambiance of a floating palace.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel Icon
timeline.detail: Conclude your day by returning to Hotel Icon to relax and reflect on the sights and experiences. Enjoy the relaxed atmosphere before bedtime.

timeline.title: Relax at Hotel Spa
timeline.detail: Wind down your day with a calming treatment at the hotel spa. Enjoy a massage or facial to rejuvenate after a full day of exploration.

localTips: Visit Wong Tai Sin Temple in the early morning for fewer crowds.
The Star Ferry provides a scenic route across Victoria Harbour.
Explore the historical areas of Central for unique architecture.

hotels.name: Hotel Icon
hotels.note: Located near Tsim Sha Tsui MTR, offering luxury amenities.
hotels.address: 17 Science Museum Rd, Tsim Sha Tsui, Kowloon, Hong Kong

budget.note: Round trip from Penang to Hong Kong
Covers meals and drinks for 2 days
For ferry rides across Victoria Harbour
Transport card for easy travel around the city
Souvenirs and gifts from local markets
